title: Numbers in context
description: Numbers mixed with words — dates, prices, measurements
text: on 25 may 2026, we spent 150 dollars on 3 books and 7 pens. order 42 takes 5 days. the year is 2026.
tips: Numbers in sentences require switching between digit row and letters
Dates and prices are common typing scenarios
Spaces between number and unit: 25 may, 150 dollars

character_tips.anna: Numbers in context — this is real life typing. Reports, invoices, dates.
character_tips.maxim: Professional writing mixes numbers and words constantly. Practice the switch.
character_tips.knopych: REAL WORLD MODE! Numbers + words = real text! 🎮
character_tips.klavochka: Stories with numbers — like a recipe with ingredients! 📖
